posts.message:
🐐 Meet Our Goat Family! 🐐

We are officially obsessed with our newest additions here at Roswell Family Farm 💛
Our mamas: Pearl & Schuyler
Our babies: Milo, Millie & Mickey

These sweet faces have already stolen our hearts and brought so much joy to the farm. We can’t wait for everyone to meet them and watch them grow!
Trust us… there’s never a dull moment with this crew 🐐✨

🥚 DUCK EGGS AVAILABLE! 🦆
Only $4 per half dozen!

Our fresh duck eggs are a baker’s secret weapon — richer, fluffier, and perfect for cakes, cookies, and pastries! 🍰✨
✔️ Larger yolks
✔️ Higher protein
✔️ Farm fresh goodness

Starting tomorrow, these will join the mini fridge on the porch at 955 Thompson Rd, Dolgeville with chicken eggs ($3/dozen). 
There will be an EGGS sign out by the road so you know you are in the right spot! 

P.S. - Our farm stand store will be opening soon (on Daley Rd) and we cannot wait to add these to the cooler along with Spofford Farm chicken eggs, our freezer section of chicken, duck, pork and beef, a produce tent and other local products from farms near us! 

Thank you to every one who supports our farm so we can keep doing what we love 💗

🍗 Chicken Count Check – Meat Birds Edition! 🐔🔥
👀 How many MEAT BIRDS do we currently have at Roswell Family Farm?!
These guys are growing FAST and keeping us BUSY! Between feeding time and watching them bulk up… it’s safe to say there are quite a few out there 👀
Think you know the number? 🤔
Drop your guess below ⬇️
🏆 Closest guess wins bragging rights (and maybe a little surprise 😉)
#RoswellFamilyFarm #MeatBirds #ChickenCount #FarmLife #GuessingGame
